{{Expand}}

{{Infobox event
| name = Enforcer Trial
| introduced = cradle-03-blackflame
}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Enforcer Trial]] is a trial that [[Lindon]] and [[Yerin]] challenge.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c14">''Blackflame'', chapter 14</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Events]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle events]]
